pi_items.metadata_value: Palomar 200-inch Hale Telescope, Large Format Camera (LFC)
pi_items.verified_value: Palomar 200-inch Hale Telescope, Large Format Camera (LFC)
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed Palomar LFC is on the Hale Telescope. Code analysis of the environment install script (install_astroimagej.sh) verified that it downloads the Astropy CCD Reduction Guide 'example-cryo-LFC' real calibration data from Zenodo (record 3254683).
Code analysis of setup_task.sh and export_result.sh confirms this exact directory is created and used as the working environment.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh and export_result.sh confirms the expected output file location.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real calibration data from the Palomar Large Format Camera (LFC) on the 200-inch Hale Telescope, obtained from the Astropy CCD Reduction Guide dataset on Zenodo. Working directory and output file paths match the claims exactly. Ground truth calculations on the provided bias and flat files confirm deterministic values within the 500x500 central ROI: mean signal = 20759.16 ADU, difference standard deviation = 135.65 ADU, difference variance = 18401.18 ADU^2, yielding a gain of 2.256 e-/ADU.
